CommunityApplications.Profile:
selfstream is a self-hosted IPTV proxy with user management, stream protection, EPG integration and watch tracking. Run it as a single Docker container on Unraid — no Redis, no external database needed.
Features: - Every user gets their own M3U URL with token - Max streams per user (blocks extra devices with HTTP 429) - Custom channel groups (Kids, Sports, Docs) with per-user assignment - Catchup / Timeshift support (IPTV Pro, TiviMate) - Live dashboard with active sessions and EPG program info - Watch history with show titles and duration - M3U and EPG auto-refresh - Setup wizard on first start
Source and documentation: https://github.com/kabelsalatundklartext/selfstream
